summary: First-finish smoke test of CityTransit backend + frontend. Backend auth (admin/driver/passenger login, register, duplicate/wrong-pw/unauth guards), routes (5 seeded), driver vehicles, go-live -> location -> live/vehicles -> go-offline, admin stats + admin lists (drivers/vehicles/routes/users), route creation (driver=pending, admin=approved), vehicle creation + approval, and admin approve of a newly registered driver all working. Frontend landing, admin demo login + tabs (dashboard/drivers/vehicles/routes/users/live), driver demo login with Go Live + vehicle/route selects, and passenger page with Leaflet map + 'No live vehicles' empty state all working. Register page renders but inputs lack data-testids.
passed: POST /api/auth/register creates passenger + returns token + user
GET /api/routes returns 5 seeded routes (Ghaziabad→Noida, Delhi→Ghaziabad, Meerut→Modinagar, Hapur→Pilkhuwa, Noida→Faridabad) all approved
GET /api/live/vehicles returns live vehicle with lat/lng/speed
POST /api/admin/drivers/{id}/approve returns 200 for newly registered driver
POST /api/vehicles by driver creates pending vehicle; POST /api/vehicles/{id}/approve by admin returns 200
Login /admin demo btn fills & submits, redirects to /admin
Admin page: tabs drivers/vehicles/routes/users/live all present; Routes tab lists seeded routes
Driver demo login redirects /driver; go-live-btn, driver-vehicle-select, driver-route-select all found
Passenger page loads with .leaflet-container and 'No live vehicles' empty state

failed.issue: Register form inputs and submit button lack data-testid attributes (register-name-input, register-email-input, register-password-input, register-submit-btn). Page renders correctly but not E2E testable via testids.
failed.evidence: Playwright query for [data-testid="register-name-input"] returned MISSING; screenshot shows form is visually present at /register.

failed.area: docs / problem statement mismatch (not a bug, informational)
failed.issue: Problem statement listed some endpoint/field names that don't match actual server: /driver/location expects {latitude, longitude} (not lat/lng); /routes expects {origin, destination} (not start/end); approve endpoints are /vehicles/{id}/approve and /routes/{id}/approve (not /admin/vehicles/{id}/approve). Verified that server + frontend use the actual (latitude/longitude, origin/destination) names, so functionality is fine.
failed.evidence: 422 with 'Field required: latitude/longitude' for lat/lng payload; retry with latitude/longitude returned 200 {ok:true, distance_km:0.0}.

failed.issue: Passenger POST /api/admin/drivers returned 405 (Method Not Allowed) instead of 403 because there is no POST endpoint on /api/admin/drivers (only GET). Access is still properly restricted for real admin actions (approve/block/delete require admin).

action_items: Add data-testids to /register page inputs: register-name-input, register-email-input, register-password-input, register-mobile-input (optional), register-role-passenger, register-role-driver, register-submit-btn.
